description:
The ``Construct DateTime`` node takes in everything needed to create a DateTime, the parts include the ``Year``, ``Month``, ``Day``, ``Hour``, ``Minute``, ``Second``, ``Millisecond``, and ``Kind``. This gets combined into a newly created DateTime value that can be used.

- Putting negative numbers into the inputs will break this node.|warning}}

fields.Year: The year for creating this DateTime.
fields.Month: The month for creating this DateTime.
fields.Day: The day for creating this DateTime.
fields.Hour: The hour for creating this DateTime.
fields.Minute: The minute for creating this DateTime.
fields.Second: The second for creating this DateTime.
fields.Millisecond: The millisecond for creating this DateTime.
fields.Kind: The type of time this is (``Unspecified``, ``Utc``, or ``Local``)
